notes: Standalone pet battle pack now covers two independently authored formal views, 12 actions, and 180 transparent runtime frames. World and mounted production remain out of scope; owner visual review remains pending. 本批比例修复明确采用当前 256px runtime-to-runtime 等比几何 overlay；未声称重建 512px canonical，历史 source/ledger 不一致继续作为债务保留；KO、颜色语义和所有非目标帧保持原样，runtime 关闭且 owner review 待定。 月岚风狐补修技能、闪避、受创失衡与复活体量；复活首帧继续与倒地末帧逐字节一致，后续帧单调恢复到待机体量。仍为 256px runtime-to-runtime 等比几何修正，不改色、不镜像、不声称重建 512px canonical，runtime 关闭且 owner review 待定。

qualityRepairs.scope: remaining skill dodge stagger and revive proportion continuity correction
